name: Home School
original_name: นักเรียนต้องขัง
overview: When children are unwanted by their parents, they are sent to the best boarding school in the country: Home School. However, Home School seems more like a prison than a school with its strict rules and regulations. Its curriculum is unique.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER] “Home School นักเรียนต้องขัง”
